From: Start Daily <microsoft.start@email2.microsoft.com>
To: emil.skogsund@gmail.com
Date: Fri, 22 Mar 2024 09:31:26 -0700
Subject: Trump Media merger wins investor approval, netting Trump potential windfall
Message-ID: <65fdb264.170a0220.c5e88.374cSMTPIN_ADDED_BROKEN@mx.google.com>
Content-Type: text/html; charset="utf-8"

                    <tr>
    <td>
        <table align="center" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" style="background-color: #FFFFFF; box-shadow: 0px 3px 0px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0);" width="600" height="52">

</tr>

                    <tr>
    <td align="center" style="padding:24px 0px 24px 0px;">
        <table cellspacing="0" width="600" style="padding:0px 3px 0 3px;">

<tr class="container">
    <td class="OneColLarge">
        <table align="center" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" style="background-color: #FFFFFF; box-shadow: 0px 5px 10px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);" width="600">
            <tr>
                <td>
                    <a id="LrgCardImage1" href="https://mucp.api.account.microsoft.com/m/v2/c?&d=AIAADGPFKWS5E5B4FRWJUNHNP4OFBPQ5VSFGMLPPBKIKUUCFB6WBPQQG27PEI4KY4GWPVL5XHSL4TF32MHIE5CMM5YDUETRT2BUUTLRNMHPE4HA4BEDK6JK7SXLLKE5T6P36NINJLKT2ETHRFTCQ73NM52WUHUJHQTK4HL4QT7WFHN4SHHBF4GF5&" style="color:#333333;text-decoration: none;" target="_blank">
                        <img width="600" height="350" style="border: none; margin: 0px 0px 0px 0px" src="https://th.bing.com/th?id=ORMS.2bfb182c20ad0a5cd2ee79d0e20bff8e&pid=Wdp&w=600&h=350&dpr=1&c=8&rs=2">
                    </a>
                </td>
            </tr>
            <tr>
                <td width="560" align="left" style="padding: 20px 20px 8px 20px; font-family:Segoe UI,Helvetica,Arial,Verdana,sans-serif; font-size:28px; line-height:1.2;color:#333333;font-weight:normal;text-decoration:none;">
                    <a id="LrgCardTitle1" href="https://mucp.api.account.microsoft.com/m/v2/c?&d=AIAADJEGSPAYVAL6Z5S2GRJMIJAEP4ZPRPFT46XDRRU26JZR6PH332NG2YRGXA4F7DM36VSUASM7F63C2RRGZ5J7B7YFWNDACBJ4P7TN3TPBZAMDHXYUPQESCWSZVXNHYXY44DFSMAXLNJ64D3SIWH4GK5MT4OXQOJ4YFW5QHKWVOPGKOSWN3UWW&" style="color:#333333;text-decoration: none;" target="_blank">
                        Trump Media merger wins investor approval, netting Trump potential windfall
                    </a>
                </td>
            </tr>
            <tr>
                <td align="left" style="padding: 0px 20px 11px 20px; font-family: Segoe UI,Helvetica,Arial,Verdana,sans-serif; font-size: 18px; color: #333333; text-decoration: none; line-height: 1.3;">
                    <a id="LrgCardSummary1" href="https://mucp.api.account.microsoft.com/m/v2/c?&d=AIAADAV3P43YQ3YNTZOEYP26SEX27XE4YW2ZXW7BLZP6JYKGEEFZCSTUWCPMXKLCCDXGYE56JKI3VVSEI32GOFX2VWGMEAZTEXPESQN7G5Q6ZBRGUV4RNMV73RZBSLTV3LU3ZFBGF5TDT3B44VHNOCZ4FOW5SXZMRJX2DC5UZ2QMAVV3VYI6PZ2I&" style="color:#333333;text-decoration: none;" target="_blank">
                            Trump will own about 60 percent of the company, which at Digital World's current share price would be worth about $3.3 billion.
                    </a>
                </td>
            </tr>
            <tr>
                <td height="25" align="left">
                    <table style="margin: 0px 20px 15px 37px;">
                        <tr>
								<td height="28" style="padding-right: 12px; padding-top: 5px">
									<a id="LrgCardProviderLogo1" href="https://mucp.api.account.microsoft.com/m/v2/c?&d=AIAAC5ESJZPTOZTUPW7KDX5NCEWIWKYCMMAZJM5QATTYRC62OFVUOWSSHI43QHPATNZ342HX6R6VA6ZNAAR24E7FL3Y43SF3YXBD5UK5XXM47QN5QTCGSDIRVFRIUJ3JHLKEWWC2SFINSSMD33MZAFFYRLA2XQJQYVR74G2OBPVRA3GFGKHKJWTD&" style="color:#333333;text-decoration: none;" target="_blank">

									</a>
								</td>

                            <td height="28" style="font-family:Segoe UI,Helvetica,Arial,Verdana,sans-serif;font-size: 18px; text-decoration: none; line-height: 1.2; border: none;color:#666666;">

                                    The Washington Post
                                </a>
                            </td>

</tr>

    <table width="295" height="100%" align="center" style="height: 100%; background-color: #FFFFFF; " cellspacing="0" cellpadding="0">

    <table width="295" height="100%" align="center" style="height: 100%; background-color: #FFFFFF; " cellspacing="0" cellpadding="0">

                            <table style="padding: 0; margin: 0;  max-width: 600px; max-height: 300px; vertical-align:middle;" cellspacing="0" cellpadding="0">
                                <tr>
                                    
<td class="container GridSmall" width="295" height="240" style="background-color: #FFFFFF; vertical-align: top; ">

    <table width="295" height="100%" align="center" style="height: 100%; background-color: #FFFFFF; " cellspacing="0" cellpadding="0">
        <tbody>
            <tr height="160" style="box-shadow: 0px 5px 0px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);">
                <td>
                    <a id="SmlArticleImg4" style="color: #333333;border: none;text-decoration: none;" href="https://mucp.api.account.microsoft.com/m/v2/c?&d=AIAACK45QT7Q3QVLIDAP2O4SIJC57KJDSG3RIPXNV3UK6XEXTXYDUHIMM7QEQGYJXJSMOQ5G5VIOIJOXUB2UDJ5KXEV7VJ4ELGYVOXDXSFBQ3AJIIXEXEZ3TKPRVNCUMC2VENPA4QLGVIVJKDDOAJWKFDYA2EP2KUAHAHGTHKVVBCVO74CNN7QGQ&" target="_blank">

            </tr>

            <tr style="height: 100%;">
                <td style="padding: 10px 10px 0px 10px; font-family: Segoe UI,Helvetica,Arial,Verdana,sans-serif; font-size: 15px; color: #333333; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: top; background-color: #FFFFFF;" width="295" height="40">
                    <a id="SmlArticleTitle4" style="color: #333333;border: none;text-decoration: none;" href="https://mucp.api.account.microsoft.com/m/v2/c?&d=AIAACGOMGK26HPRUQZLVK7KUVK7HZSNUGYHJ4RXWCDILIJFUMYUZSHQOOVUWREODDSQVGZQ3UVBPGXQU4BKARFOZE3JXK7EUIJQYAA3DXIDYQ74JLOZZQ2DGZ3YCGF2D553GSRE22BUK3BOMBGAQEBZHOCLFGHBZRPTR2OM2UKSA4OWCXGEA2PI6&" target="_blank">

                <td align="left">
                    <table style="margin: 5px 0px 8px 10px;">
                        <tbody>
                            <tr>

                                        <a id="SmlArticlePubLogo4" style="color: #333333;border: none;text-decoration: none;" href="https://mucp.api.account.microsoft.com/m/v2/c?&d=AIAACUOC333ZPKTYFPGBUH3ZV4NF2KIIZJWGOFFANK7Z47CMS7NEOYJYFXWJ7OOA7U5CSLK7TR24PQHBBJD3OS5BBQRILF2KA3MM3LRDZOSFS7NUTTS6A5BHH6PHS3EYSV3H5UQQLKESMPUQBY36ZYWWGDGH6RCVYLGGHAV74QZNJILZVDQ5D4S4&" target="_blank">

                                        </a>
                                    </td>
                                <td height="45" style="font-family: Segoe UI,Helvetica,Arial,Verdana,sans-serif;color: #666666; font-size: 15px; text-decoration: none; line-height: 20px; height: 20px; border: none;">
                                    <a id="SmlArticlePubName4" style="color: #333333;border: none;text-decoration: none;" href="https://mucp.api.account.microsoft.com/m/v2/c?&d=AIAACKD4KSHWNGAPRKFPURK3ZXOPB6SGVDY624OTYNYNLK4E4SZQYMUHAMVPPTBNS3TSQDWKDOQANVHMD64L3YARRIM2PH3GGR7YID6BFIBEXEEWIUKAB6UJGQCOSMJGUVDWD4GIJQOOSRF3FKFWG4YXSHME332573PG2YD55AKR2E3BPNSO7XY3&" target="_blank">

</td>
                                    <td style="padding:4px;margin:0px;width:0px; background-color: transparent;">&nbsp;
                                    </td>
                                    
<td class="container GridSmall" width="295" height="240" style="background-color: #FFFFFF; vertical-align: top; ">

    <table width="295" height="100%" align="center" style="height: 100%; background-color: #FFFFFF; " cellspacing="0" cellpadding="0">
        <tbody>
            <tr height="160" style="box-shadow: 0px 5px 0px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);">
                <td>

            </tr>

            <tr style="height: 100%;">
                <td style="padding: 10px 10px 0px 10px; font-family: Segoe UI,Helvetica,Arial,Verdana,sans-serif; font-size: 15px; color: #333333; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: top; background-color: #FFFFFF;" width="295" height="40">
